# Pept — Peptide Education & Research Platform

> A comprehensive resource for educational content, evidence-based peptide profiles, vetted suppliers, and AI-powered research assistance related to peptides.

Pept.me provides structured information on peptides, including detailed profiles, research insights, and supplier verification, making it a valuable source for researchers, students, and professionals interested in peptide science. This site offers evergreen, authoritative content to support learning, citation, and research activities.

## Core Content

[Ask anything about peptides](https://pept.me)

### Peptide Profiles
- Evidence-based peptide data with citation ratings and research references
- Profiles include BPC-157, TB-500, GHK-Cu, Epitalon, Thymalin, CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, Melanotan II, Semax, and more

### Research and Educational Material
- Summaries of peptide studies, mechanisms, and potential applications
- Information on research status: animal studies, limited human data, research-only

### Vetted Suppliers
- Directory of tested and verified peptide suppliers
- Ensures quality and testing verification for research peptides

### Questions & Discussions
- AI-powered assistant for instant answers about peptide properties, research, and uses
- Educational and non-medical guidance only

## Resources

[View All Peptides](/peptides)
[Categories](/categories)

### Categories
- Antimicrobial Peptides
- Growth Factors
- Immune Modulation
- Metabolic Peptides
- Neuropeptides
- Tissue Repair

### Important Pages
- [Epitalon](https://pept.me/peptides/epitalon): Telomerase activation and melatonin modulation
- [Thymalin](https://pept.me/peptides/thymalin): Immune and anti-aging properties
- [CJC-1295](https://pept.me/peptides/cjc-1295): Growth hormone-releasing analogue
- [Ipamorelin](https://pept.me/peptides/ipamorelin): Growth hormone secretagogue
- [Melanotan II](https://pept.me/peptides/melanotan-ii): Skin pigmentation
- [Semax](https://pept.me/peptides/semax): Nootropic and neuroprotective peptide

## Optional

### Additional Resources
- Research articles and papers linked within peptide profiles
- Educational blogs and updates (if available)

This platform is intended for educational and research purposes only. Consult qualified healthcare professionals before any application of peptide information.
